g.text: Settings ▸ Key Bindings ▸ Vim Mode — live install + persist
Debounced ~400 ms: editor edits stream fast,
so the writes coalesce into a single save.
Two stores stay in sync: [:ui :keymaps] is the persisted source of truth;
the keymap atom is the live copy the resolver reads on each keydown.
install-active! is the one-way bridge db → atom.
